apps.app_name: Open and transparent management of personal information
findings: Found 3 key indicators addressing 71% of requirements
gaps: No privacy contact details provided
No process for making a privacy complaint
Policy not available in an accessible format
apps.recommended_language:
RECOMMENDED: "We are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy sets out how
we collect, use, disclose, and manage personal information in accordance with the Australian
Privacy Act 1988 (Cth)."

findings: Found 1 key indicators addressing 25% of requirements
gaps: No option to use a pseudonym where practical
Doesn't explain why anonymity isn't practical (if applicable)
No mention of dealing without identifying yourself
apps.recommended_language: Review APP 2 (Anonymity and pseudonymity) requirements and update policy to address identified gaps.

findings: Found 4 key indicators addressing 71% of requirements
gaps: Doesn't explain why collection is reasonably necessary
No commitment to collecting accurate information
No commitment to collecting complete information
apps.recommended_language: Review APP 3 (Collection of solicited personal information) requirements and update policy to address identified gaps.

findings: Found 2 key indicators addressing 40% of requirements
gaps: No process for handling unsolicited personal information
No policy on information received without request
No policy on unrequested personal information
apps.recommended_language: Review APP 4 (Dealing with unsolicited personal information) requirements and update policy to address identified gaps.

apps.app_name: Notification of the collection of personal information
findings: Found 3 key indicators addressing 37% of requirements
gaps: No collection notice at or before time of collection
Doesn't explain why personal information is collected
Doesn't explain how personal information is used
apps.recommended_language: Review APP 5 (Notification of the collection of personal information) requirements and update policy to address identified gaps.

apps.app_name: Use or disclosure of personal information
findings: Found 8 key indicators addressing 62% of requirements
gaps: No statement on secondary use of information
Doesn't explain related purposes for information use
Doesn't explain information sharing practices
apps.recommended_language: Review APP 6 (Use or disclosure of personal information) requirements and update policy to address identified gaps.

findings: Found 3 key indicators addressing 62% of requirements
gaps: No opt-out mechanism for marketing communications
No unsubscribe option for marketing
No policy on promotional communications
apps.recommended_language: Review APP 7 (Direct marketing) requirements and update policy to address identified gaps.

findings: Found 2 key indicators addressing 25% of requirements
gaps: No policy on international data sharing
No cross-border data transfer policy
No international transfer safeguards described
apps.recommended_language: Review APP 8 (Cross-border disclosure of personal information) requirements and update policy to address identified gaps.

apps.app_name: Adoption, use or disclosure of government related identifiers
findings: Found 1 key indicators addressing 25% of requirements
gaps: No policy on handling Tax File Numbers
No Tax File Number handling policy
No policy on company number handling
apps.recommended_language: Review APP 9 (Adoption, use or disclosure of government related identifiers) requirements and update policy to address identified gaps.

findings: Found 4 key indicators addressing 28% of requirements
gaps: No commitment to keeping information accurate
No process for keeping records current
No commitment to data completeness
apps.recommended_language: Review APP 10 (Quality of personal information) requirements and update policy to address identified gaps.

findings: Found 4 key indicators addressing 33% of requirements
gaps: No mention of encryption for data protection
No access control measures described
No password or authentication policies
apps.recommended_language: Review APP 11 (Security of personal information) requirements and update policy to address identified gaps.

findings: Found 3 key indicators addressing 71% of requirements
gaps: No subject access request process
No access request procedure explained
No individual access rights described
apps.recommended_language: Review APP 12 (Access to personal information) requirements and update policy to address identified gaps.

findings: Found 5 key indicators addressing 42% of requirements
gaps: No process for correcting inaccurate information
No correction request procedure
No process for updating personal information
apps.recommended_language: Review APP 13 (Correction of personal information) requirements and update policy to address identified gaps.
